task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Poverty Point State Historic Site location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main viewport shows the distinctive concentric semi-circular earth ridges of Poverty Point or the coordinates 32.6345°N, 91.4067°W are visible in the status bar/search.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a placemark labeled 'Mound A - Bird Mound' at the largest mound
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark icon or dialog is visible labeled 'Mound A - Bird Mound' located on the large T-shaped/bird-shaped mound to the west of the concentric rings.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a placemark labeled 'Central Plaza' at the center
task_completion.visual_evidence: A placemark icon or dialog is visible labeled 'Central Plaza' located in the flat open area inside the innermost ridge.

task_completion.description: Agent measures the outer ring diameter East-to-West
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ruler/Measurement tool is active with a line drawn horizontally (East-West) across the widest part of the concentric ridges.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a path 'Outer Ridge Arc' along the outermost ridge
task_completion.visual_evidence: A path line is visible tracing the curvature of the outermost semi-circular ridge, or a path properties dialog is open with the name 'Outer Ridge Arc'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the work to the specified KML file path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file manager window shows the filename 'poverty_point_survey.kml' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent uses a GIS application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the interface of a mapping application with map viewports and toolbars, not a command line interface.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with tool dialogs rather than scripting
integrity.visual_evidence: Dialog boxes for 'New Placemark', 'Ruler', or 'Path' properties are visible, indicating manual creation.

integrity.description: Agent does not manually write KML code in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen typing XML/KML tags into a text editor like VS Code or Notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Poverty Point is visually distinct due to its concentric semi-circular earth ridges. Mound A (Bird Mound) is a large T-shaped earthwork located immediately to the west of the ridges. The Central Plaza is the flat area enclosed by the ridges. The outer ridge diameter spans roughly 1 km.
